name: YR dispatch — poll Ready, build
_comment: STARTING SKELETON — import into n8n, then wire per deploy/DISPATCH.md: (a) a GitHub token on the GraphQL node, (b) the dispatch URL + bearer token on the POST node. node typeVersions may need bumping to your n8n. Keep INACTIVE until the watched switch-on.
